name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: We have to have the will to put our country on a sustainable fiscal path. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: A strong economic recovery is possible. It’s up to us. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: Pro-growth tax reform would kickstart a surge of investment and economic growth. We would see the recovery we've been waiting for. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: If we put entitlements on sustainable path, we ensure their survival. Most important thing to avoid fiscal crisis we're courting. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: We need to reform the entitlement programs driving our fiscal problems -- we have to agree on the fundamental problem. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: There's little dispute if we do pro-growth tax reform right, it will generate economic growth and the jobs that come with it. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: We can use the next year to do what we need – pro-growth tax reform. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: We should extend the current tax rates for another year; they've been in place for 12 yrs. Then use next year to reform tax code. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: I think there’s a better way than going over the fiscal cliff, as some of my colleagues have recommended. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: Our plan ensured the lower brackets did not have increases. The tax code would become more progressive, not less progressive. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: That's why I find it so objectionable that those who knew better say we wanted to increase taxes on middle class to pay for rich. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: We stipulated right at the beginning of this arrangement that all net new revenue come from the top two brackets. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: Strong bipartisan consensus that we needed corp. tax reform. Supercommittee had unlimited jurisdiction -- we could have done that. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: My supercommittee proposal offered $500B of new revenue. We were meeting them at the halfway point. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: Any new revenue had to come in conjunction with new pro-growth tax reform, which bipartisan deficit commissions have recommended. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: Democrats wanted a huge tax increase, but they were not willing to begin to solve the real problem. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: What Republican supercommittee members wanted was to make structural reforms to at least one entitlement, make it sustainable. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: No significant government program can grow faster than our economy indefinitely. All three big entitlements are growing faster. #BIToomey

name: Senator Pat Toomey
tweet: Watch my @BrookingsInst speech live at 9 a.m.  http://t.co/IOeI93Ny I'll set the record straight on my supercommittee proposal. #BIToomey
